sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_times (event_id INT, event_time TIME(6));
INSERT INTO test_times (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, time(6) '12:30:45.123456');
UPDATE test_times SET event_time = time(6) '15:00:00.654321' WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM test_times WHERE event_time > time(6) '14:00:00';
DELETE FROM test_times WHERE event_time = time(6) '12:30:45.123456';
